calendar.matters:
Amended Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Off Calendar

Amended Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeff Strobel for (petitioner) Susan Goodwin.

The Court stated that this is a petition for order confirming trust assets, that there is an issue in that the documentation contemplated a 2 step change and that the 1st step was never carried out. Mr. Strobel asked if the Court could just confirm the property. The Court stated that the trustor set out what the plan was and it was not to just put the property into the trust and that the documents signed stated what was to happen. Mr. Strobel stated that they know the intention, that they had converted 6 other properties and that the intention was for the property to be in the trust. The Court stated that it is not simply looking for intent, that they need to have documents showing the transfer and that it was conditional. Mr. Strobel asked for a continuance to be able to submit additional documentation. The amended petition for order confirming trust assets was continued to August 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for additional evidence.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance and the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is off calendar.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
